subcodes.first_line: O dear handmaid of God! Thy letter hath arrived. Its contents were the cause of joy, inasmuch as it indicated that, praise be God, there is heartfelt amity among the Baha'is
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی نامه تو رسید از مضمون سرور حاصل گردید زیرا دلیل بر آن بود
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
